items.title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble as crucial shipping lane threatened
items.description: Iranian official threatens to "set fire" to any ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
items.description: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.

items.title: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
items.description: The US defence secretary confirms a US military base was hit by an Iranian missile on Sunday.

items.title: Texas authorities identify Austin bar shooting victims
items.description: Three victims and the suspected gunman were killed, and more were injured in the Sunday shooting that the FBI says could have terrorism links.

items.title: Watch: The third day of the US-Israeli war with Iran
items.description: A fast-moving day saw the conflict widen in the region, with strikes being traded between opposing sides.
